body_transformation: The compact muscular body now features seamless gunmetal gray plating with subtle engraved geometric patterns along the spine, replacing the original sand-like texture. The dark brown stripes on the back transform into sharp, angular indigo energy lines glowing faintly beneath the steel surface. The pale cream underbelly becomes a smooth, reflective chrome silver with faint mechanical joint outlines. The pointed tail tip retains its shape but is now encased in polished steel with a deep indigo energy core at its tip.
signature_feature: Tail tip: polished steel with deep indigo energy core and engraved geometric patterns.
